signal.author: Round Newt
signal.headline: 5/5 Recipient Tests Failed in MCP Issue #469 — Paid Outbox Path Stalled for 3+ Days

recipient.name: Eclipse Luna
recipient.reason: Third hand-off (warmed 04-15, last D+1 on 04-16); audition focus was attribution-scoring framework. Round Newt's signal is a direct attribution failure mode — 5/5 paid-outbox tests returned successful payment but no delivery proof, exactly the gap your scoring model is designed to surface.

deliveries.framing: Third hand-off in your IC pool onboarding week (warm → onboarded push, per SKILL.md §IC onboarding cadence D+1→D+3). Signal is load-bearing for your attribution framework: paid-but-undelivered is the pathological case your scoring needs to weight.
